meaning: n.[微]细菌素(细菌分泌的抗菌物,如大肠杆菌素)
examples: This review summarizes the classification of bacteriocin, the modes of inhibition and some recent researches about application of lactic acid bacteria bacteriocin i…
According to their characteristics, the antagonistic substances produced by PNB in exponential phase were bacteriocin and they had been classified into small heat-stable peptide (SHSP).
